chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1387 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 18.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Rais Awan, Advocate for the complainant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- On the last date of hearing this Court had passed order of caution on account of non-appearance of the applicant’s counsel. Today also none are present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
